records.name: Pedro Pascal
records.bio: Pedro Pascal style archive featuring curated replica looks from films, events, and public appearances.

records.name: Darshan Thoogudeepa
records.bio: Darshan Thoogudeepa, known as 'Challenging Star', is one of the biggest action stars of Sandalwood. Known for mass entertainers like Kurukshetra and Robert.

records.name: Yash
records.bio: Yash, the 'Rocking Star', rose to global fame with the KGF franchise. His rugged yet stylish looks have set major fashion trends across India.

records.name: Kiccha Sudeep
records.bio: Kiccha Sudeep is a pan-India star known for Vikrant Rona and Eega. His versatile fashion blends traditional Kannada roots with modern contemporary style.

records.name: Puneeth Rajkumar
records.bio: Puneeth Rajkumar, fondly called 'Appu', was the power star of Sandalwood. A legend known for his energy, charm, and iconic style in films like Yuvarathnaa.

records.name: Upendra
records.bio: Upendra is a celebrated actor-director known for his avant-garde film style and iconic roles. His edgy fashion sense is as unique as his filmmaking.

records.name: Shivarajkumar
records.bio: Shivarajkumar is a legendary Sandalwood actor from the iconic Rajkumar family. Known for Bhajarangi and Rustum, his regal style commands respect.

records.name: Ramesh Aravind
records.bio: Ramesh Aravind is a veteran Sandalwood actor and director known for his suave, urbane style. Famous for Shanti Shanti Shanti and numerous Telugu films.

records.name: Dhananjaya
records.bio: Dhananjaya is one of Sandalwood's finest character actors, known for Tagaru and Kantara. His intense screen presence is matched by his effortlessly cool street style.

records.name: Rishab Shetty
records.bio: Rishab Shetty is the acclaimed director-actor behind the blockbuster Kantara. His earthy, culturally rooted aesthetic has sparked a new wave of Kannada fashion.

records.name: Golden Star Ganesh
records.bio: Golden Star Ganesh is Sandalwood's beloved comedy-drama hero. Known for Gultoo and Shivajinagara, his bright, fun fashion reflects his on-screen personality.

records.name: Vijay Raghavendra
records.bio: Vijay Raghavendra is known for action entertainers in Sandalwood. His polished red-carpet looks and traditional ensembles make him a style icon.

records.name: Srinagar Kitty
records.bio: Srinagar Kitty is a popular Sandalwood character and lead actor known for his comedic timing and casual-chic fashion sense.

records.name: Diganth
records.bio: Diganth is a youth icon of Sandalwood known for Mungaru Male and Pancharangi. His youthful, trendy fashion appeals to the younger generation.

records.name: Rakshit Shetty
records.bio: Rakshit Shetty is a National Award-winning actor-director behind 777 Charlie and Kirik Party. His minimalist, earthy style complements his artistic persona.

records.name: Nirup Bhandari
records.bio: Nirup Bhandari is a rising star of Sandalwood known for Tagaru and Rathnaveera. His sharp contemporary fashion is gaining recognition across South India.

records.name: Pramod Shetty
records.bio: Pramod Shetty is a popular Sandalwood actor known for his comic roles and vibrant fashion presence at film events.

records.name: Chiranjeevi Sarja
records.bio: Chiranjeevi Sarja was a prominent Sandalwood action star known for Aadhi and Odeya. His bold, stylish avatar left a lasting impression on Kannada cinema.

records.name: Aditya Narayan
records.bio: Aditya Narayan is a young, energetic Sandalwood actor known for his sporty looks and streetwear fashion in youth-oriented films.

records.name: Chetan Achara
records.bio: Chetan Achara is a Sandalwood comedian and character actor celebrated for his lively personality and vibrant event appearances.

records.name: Arjun Janya
records.bio: Arjun Janya is a leading music composer of Sandalwood known for Yajamana and KGF. His suave, polished appearance at award ceremonies has made him a fashion favorite.

records.name: Rachita Ram
records.bio: Rachita Ram is the most popular actress of Sandalwood, known for her elegant sarees and glamorous film looks. She has starred in films like Raajakumara and Yajamana.

records.name: Ragini Dwivedi
records.bio: Ragini Dwivedi is a popular Sandalwood actress known for Veera Madakari and Ravichandran films. Her bold, modern style fuses ethnic roots with contemporary fashion.

records.name: Aindrita Ray
records.bio: Aindrita Ray is one of Sandalwood's leading actresses, known for her fashion-forward choices and stunning ethnic ensembles at Filmfare and SIIMA events.

records.name: Haripriya
records.bio: Haripriya is a versatile Sandalwood actress known for Killing Veerappan and Kempe Gowda. Her vibrant, colour-forward wardrobe is a signature of her public persona.

records.name: Srinidhi Shetty
records.bio: Srinidhi Shetty, the former Miss Supranational India and KGF actress, is a pan-India style icon known for high glamour and luxurious fashion choices.

records.name: Parul Yadav
records.bio: Parul Yadav is a bilingual actress known for Googly and Mr. & Mrs. Ramachari. Her chic modern wardrobe mixes Indo-Western fusion with bold ethnic looks.

records.name: Deepa Sannidhi
records.bio: Deepa Sannidhi is a Sandalwood actress and activist known for her roles in Ugramm and Mr. & Mrs. Ramachari, as well as her clean, classic fashion aesthetic.

records.name: Amulya
records.bio: Amulya is a beloved Sandalwood actress who started young and matured into a versatile star. Known for Kempe Gowda and Ambari, her style ranges from playful to traditional.

records.name: Anu Prabhakar
records.bio: Anu Prabhakar is a Sandalwood actress and talk show host known for her bold fashion choices and strong screen presence in films like Thayige Thakka Maga.

records.name: Rukmini Vasanth
records.bio: Rukmini Vasanth is a rising Sandalwood actress and daughter of director Rajendra Singh Babu. Known for Birugaali and Avane Srimannarayana, her style is fresh and contemporary.

records.name: Khesari Lal Yadav
records.bio: Khesari Lal Yadav style archive featuring curated replica looks from films, events, and public appearances.

records.name: Anubhav Mohanty
records.bio: Anubhav Mohanty style archive featuring curated replica looks from films, events, and public appearances.
